classes.name: setup.CleanCommand
documentation: Custom clean command to tidy up the project root.

classes.name: setup.InstallCommand
documentation: Custom install command to clear old client daemon

functions.name: fc_common.version.get_runtime_version
documentation:
`fc_common` including `VERSION` maybe upgraded by other caller packages,
so internal package version is the most reliable item,
fallback to `VERSION` only when in docker release

modules.name: doc.conf
documentation: Configuration file for the Sphinx documentation builder.

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.labgrid.Plugin.__labgrid_init
documentation: Let FC take over by inject special reservation

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.labgrid.Plugin.force_kick_off
documentation: Allow coordinator to seize labgrid resource

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.labgrid.Plugin.booking_info
documentation: Current booking info of this framework

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.labgrid.Plugin.__seize_resource
documentation: Request coordinator to seize low priority resource

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.labgrid.Plugin.schedule
documentation:
Monitor Labgrid reserve queue, once have pending reservation,
release current fc acquisition to let normal user acquire the device
Coodinator will call this function periodly

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.labgrid.Plugin.init
documentation:
Generate and return tasks to let fc own specified labgrid devices
This be called only once when coordinator start

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.utils.lava.Lava.lava_get_queued_jobs
documentation: LAVA limit at most 100 jobs return for api call

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.__reset_possible_resource
documentation:
Maintenance all devices once devices finish scheduling.
Meanwhile, return resouces which participate LAVA scheduling to FC if device idle.

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.__get_job_tags
documentation: Return job tag info, issue interface call will return None

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.__get_device_tags
documentation: Return device tag info, issue interface call will return None

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.__get_device_info
documentation: Configureable wrapper of lava_get_device_info to clean cache

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.__get_device_description
documentation: Return device description, issue interface call will return None

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.force_kick_off
documentation: Allow coordinator to seize lava resource

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.__seize_resource
documentation: Request coordinator to seize low priority resource

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.default_framework_disconnect
documentation: Default framework should realize this to let FC control the disconnect

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.default_framework_connect
documentation: Default framework should realize this to let FC control the connect

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.booking_info
documentation: Current booking info of this framework

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.schedule
documentation:
Monitor LAVA job queue, once have pending jobs, online related devices
to let LAVA take over these devices
Coodinator will call this function periodly

methods.name: fc_server.plugins.lava.Plugin.init
documentation:
Generate and return tasks to let fc own specified lava devices correctly
Called only once when coordinator start

classes.name: fc_server.core.plugin.FCPlugin
documentation:
Base plugin of FC
Detail framework plugins should realize next interfaces
`init`, `schedule`, `force_kick_off`, `booking_info`

classes.name: fc_server.core.coordinator.Coordinator

methods.name: fc_server.core.coordinator.Coordinator.__get_low_priority_frameworks
documentation: Get all frameworks with low priority compared to current framework

methods.name: fc_server.core.coordinator.Coordinator.coordinate_resources
documentation: Seize resource from low priority framework
FC coordinator which used to coordinate status among different frameworks
